name: Jason Co., Ltd.
summary: Jason Co., Ltd. engages in the operation and development of discount and variety stores in Japan. The company offers clothing and interior goods, including men's clothing, children clothing, women's clothing, underwear's, socks, shoes, shoe bags, umbrellas, belts, and bedding upholstery products; and daily necessities and household items, such as home appliances, household cooking supplies, watches, glasses, cameras, mobile phones, toys, stationery, car supplies, sports and leisure products, bicycles, do-it-yourself products, gardening and kitchen supplies, cosmetics, detergents and cleaning supplies, and pet and baby products. It also provides grocery goods comprising general food products and processed meat; alcoholic beverages; and cigarettes. In addition, the company engages in the royalty business, as well as provides logistics and rental services. It operates 103 directly managed stores and 2 co-delivery centers. Jason Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Kashiwa, Japan.
